title: Multi-Zone Crystallization Cooling Profile Controller
description: Executes a four-zone programmable cooling profile (60 → 45 → 30 → 20 °C, 5 min dwell per zone) for solution crystallisation of inorganic salts. A Peltier TEC module provides bidirectional thermal control; the SSR-Controlled Water Cooling Jacket removes waste heat from the TEC hot side. A DS18B20 probe monitors solution temperature; all zone transitions and temperatures are logged to SD card. Latent heat events (plateau in cooling curve) are flagged.
objective: Execute a user-defined four-zone cooling profile within ±1 °C per zone, detect crystallisation onset from latent heat plateau, and log the complete thermal trajectory.
constraints: Arduino Uno, DS18B20, Peltier TEC1-12706, L298N, SSR water cooling jacket, SD logger; aqueous inorganic salt solutions only; minimum temperature 15 °C; max TEC power 40 W.
design_element_titles: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver

element_usage_notes.DS18B20 1-Wire Temperature Probe Array: Immersed in crystallising solution; 0.5 Hz reads detect latent heat plateau as dT/dt anomaly.
element_usage_notes.Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver: PWM-driven for fine cooling/heating; direction set by zone target relative to current temperature.
element_usage_notes.Temperature Profile Scheduler: Stores four-zone targets and dwell times; advances zones after setpoint ± 1 °C is held for dwell period.
element_usage_notes.SSR-Controlled Water Cooling Jacket: Removes heat from TEC hot side to maintain efficiency; SSR duty cycle proportional to TEC power.
element_usage_notes.SD Card Data Logger Module: Logs t, zone, setpoint, measured T, and latent-heat flag at 1 Hz.

element_interactions.to: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.description: Scheduler provides current target temperature to TEC bang-bang controller
Measured temperature used to determine if zone setpoint is held within tolerance

element_interactions.from: Peltier TEC Module with H-Bridge Driver
element_interactions.description: SSR duty cycle matched to TEC power to dissipate hot-side heat
Full cooling curve logged; plateau detection flags crystallisation onset
